prompt: A Japanese listing-ad style landing page hero banner for a fictional law office and tax accountant office, designed like a bold web advertisement with four equal vertical panels across the top and a strong call-to-action area across the bottom. The top row contains exactly 4 service panels, each with a colored header bar, a photo-realistic stock-photo image, and a colored caption bar at the bottom. Panel 1 is red and labeled 「刑事事件」 at the top, showing a close-up of two hands gripping dark prison bars against a black background; the bottom red caption reads 「逮捕・訴訟に即対応！」 in large bold white Japanese text. Panel 2 is blue and labeled 「交通事故」 at the top, showing a realistic rear-end car crash with two damaged dark-colored sedans on a city street in daylight; the bottom blue caption reads 「慰謝料・示談もお任せ！」 in large bold white Japanese text. Panel 3 is green and labeled 「相続税」 at the top, showing an elderly couple seated at a table consulting with a suited professional, with papers and a small house model visible; the bottom green caption reads 「税相続対策をしっかりサポート！」 in large bold white Japanese text. Panel 4 is orange and labeled 「離婚問題」 at the top, showing a distressed woman sitting indoors with her head resting on one hand; the bottom orange caption reads 「慰謝料・親権の悩みを解決！」 in large bold white Japanese text. Make the four panels touch edge-to-edge with clean white dividers, each panel occupying the same width, and use highly saturated primary colors with glossy ad-design styling. Beneath the four panels, create a cream or light beige background footer area. On the left side, place a smaller black subheadline in Japanese: 「法律相談・税務相談なら」. Centered below it, place the large main office name in metallic gold gradient bold Japanese lettering with a slight bevel effect: 「{argument name="office name" default="〇〇法律事務所・税理士事務所"}」. Add thin black horizontal divider lines above and below the main office name. On the lower right, place a large glossy red rounded rectangular button with a bright gradient and white bold Japanese text reading 「{argument name="button text" default="無料相談受付中！"}」. The overall style should feel like a Japanese legal and tax services LP main visual from a listing ad: corporate, urgent, trustworthy, commercial, photo-based, clean grid layout, bold typography, high contrast, and realistic brochure-quality compositing.
translatedPrompt: 一张采用日本列表广告风格的落地页首屏横幅，专为虚构的律师事务所和税务师事务所设计，呈现出醒目的网页广告效果，顶部设有四个等宽的垂直面板，底部设有强力的行动号召区域。顶行包含 4 个服务面板，每个面板均配有彩色标题栏、写实风格的素材图片以及底部的彩色说明栏。面板 1 为红色，顶部标注「刑事事件」，展示了一双紧握黑色背景下深色监狱铁栏的手部特写；底部红色说明栏以醒目的白色粗体日文写着「逮捕・訴訟に即対応！」。面板 2 为蓝色，顶部标注「交通事故」，展示了日光下城市街道上两辆受损深色轿车的真实追尾场景；底部蓝色说明栏以醒目的白色粗体日文写着「慰謝料・示談もお任せ！」。面板 3 为绿色，顶部标注「相続税」，展示了一对老年夫妇坐在桌前咨询身着西装的专业人士，桌上可见文件和一个小型房屋模型；底部绿色说明栏以醒目的白色粗体日文写着「税相続対策をしっかりサポート！」。面板 4 为橙色，顶部标注「離婚問題」，展示了一位神情忧郁的女性坐在室内，单手托腮；底部橙色说明栏以醒目的白色粗体日文写着「慰謝料・親権の悩みを解決！」。四个面板需边缘紧贴，并以干净的白色线条分隔，每个面板宽度一致，采用高饱和度原色及光泽感的广告设计风格。在四个面板下方，创建一个奶油色或浅米色的背景页脚区域。左侧放置一行较小的黑色日文副标题：「法律相談・税務相談なら」。正下方居中放置金属金渐变色、带有轻微斜面效果的粗体日文主事务所名称：「{argument name="office name" default="〇〇法律事務所・税理士事務所"}」。在事务所名称上下方添加细黑色水平分割线。右下角放置一个大型光泽红色圆角矩形按钮，带有明亮的渐变效果，并配有白色粗体日文：「{argument name="button text" default="無料相談受付中！"}」。整体风格应呈现出日本法律与税务服务 LP 列表广告主视觉的效果：企业化、紧迫感、值得信赖、商业化、基于照片、干净的网格布局、醒目的排版、高对比度以及写实的宣传册级合成效果。

breakdown.creativeCore: 日本法律服务 LP 横幅：一张用于虚构法律与税务事务所的醒目日本落地页首屏图片，适用于法律服务广告、列表页及企业 LP 模型。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 品牌字标、标题字、活动视觉、字体风格探索

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 字体/Logo image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, close-up, grid, vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: high contrast]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
